home.title: BlitzForm - mobilna fabryka druku 3D na miejscu i części przemysłowe
home.description: BlitzForm oferuje mobilny druk 3D w terenie, szybkie przetwarzanie części przemysłowych i cyfrowy magazyn części wprost do Twojej lokalizacji.

hero.description: Utilizing modern full-stack frameworks and tech-first design principles to build digital products that last.

whoAmI.main_statement: I am a full-stack software engineer dedicated to building high-performance digital products where robust logic meets seamless user experience.
whoAmI.paragraph_1: My work exists at the intersection of complex system architecture and intuitive design. I don't just write code; I architect end-to-end solutions that prioritize scalability, security, and maintainability.
whoAmI.paragraph_2: With deep roots in the JavaScript ecosystem—from optimized React interfaces to resilient Node.js/Next.js backends—I focus on creating fluid applications that feel natural and perform at scale. Every line of server logic and every millisecond of latency matters.

items.title: Full-Stack Architecture
items.desc: Designing scalable, end-to-end systems using Next.js, Node.js, and modern databases that scale with your business.

items.title: API Engineering
items.desc: Building robust, secure, and well-documented RESTful and GraphQL APIs to power seamless data flow.

items.title: Frontend Excellence
items.desc: Translating complex designs into pixel-perfect, high-performance interfaces with React and Framer Motion.

items.title: Database Design
items.desc: Architecting efficient data models and optimizing queries in PostgreSQL and MongoDB for maximum reliability.

items.title: Performance Ops
items.desc: Deep-diving into Core Web Vitals, server-side rendering, and caching strategies for lightning-fast loads.

items.title: Product Engineering
items.desc: Beyond coding: understanding business logic and user needs to deliver complete, value-driven products.

items.label: Experience
items.s: I build systems that don't just work, but delight with their fluidity. Every cursor movement and transition has a purpose and rhythm.

items.label: Performance
items.s: Zero unnecessary waiting. I optimize code so that interactions are instant, keeping the backend invisible to the user.

items.label: Simplicity
items.s: I remove the noise and leave pure value. I design logical, intuitive paths where the user never gets lost.

items.label: Motion
items.s: Subtle animations and micro-interactions are my specialty. I give applications a human touch through refined motion design.

personal.subtitle: High performance
personal.quote: I see code as a high-performance machine—beneath. Backend is the raw power under the hood; frontend is the aerodynamics of the experience. I eliminate drag to ensure every interaction is instant and fluid.

contact.description: Whether you have a fully-formed idea or just a spark of a vision, I'm here to help you build the exceptional.

project1.title: Smokin’s Loyalty App
project1.description: A simple QR-based loyalty program. No paper cards, just scan and earn rewards directly on your phone.

project2.title: Blitzform 3D
project2.description: A modern site for a startup building mobile 3D printing containers. Tech-focused design for high-tech hardware.

project3.title: Side Quests
project3.description: My creative playground. A collection of 3D experiments, realistic renders, and digital branding concepts.

project1.title: Smokin’s Loyalty App
project1.description: A simple and efficient loyalty program that allows users to earn and redeem points by scanning QR codes. The app includes separate roles for users and admins, ensuring seamless in-store management via smartphone only.

project2.title: Blanco Trade WebApp
project2.description: A modern B2B platform designed to simplify trading operations and data visualization for business partners. The app provides responsive dashboards, advanced analytics, and real-time updates for seamless collaboration.

project3.title: Design & 3D Visualization
project3.description: A creative collection of 3D product visualizations and web design projects. Each render highlights realistic materials, lighting, and precise modeling used in modern digital branding.
